name: Holiday Muffin Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour into a bowl and level it off.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients; mix well until just combined.
3. Store in an airtight container at room temperature or in a cool, dry place.
4. For gift giving, measure 2 cups of the mix (by dipping a cup into the mix) and place in an airtight container or zipper-top storage bag. Include the recipe for Holiday Muffins. About 8 cups of mix will yield approximately 12 muffins.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Grease the bottoms only of 12 muffin cups, or line with paper baking cups.
7. In a medium bowl, place the muffin mix. Add water, beaten egg, and oil; stir until dry ingredients are just moistened. Do not overmix.
8. Fill prepared muffin cups about 1/2 full.
9. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Immediately remove from the pan.
10. Serve warm. For high altitude (above 3,500 feet), bake at 425°F (220°C) and reduce baking powder to 2 1/2 tablespoons.
